acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

account.title: 2. Account Registration
account.content: To access certain features of our services, you may need to create an account. You are responsible for:

items.accurate: Providing accurate and complete information during registration
items.security: Maintaining the security of your account credentials
items.responsibility: All activities that occur under your account

serviceUsage.title: 3. Acceptable Use
serviceUsage.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You agree not to:

items.lawful: Use the services in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
items.noHarm: Attempt to interfere with or disrupt the services or servers
items.noAbuse: Engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits others from using the services

intellectualProperty.title: 4. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content, features, and functionality of our services are owned by us and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

termination.title: 5. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to our services immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including breach of these terms.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: In no event shall we be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or relating to your use of the services.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or replace these terms at any time. We will provide notice of any significant changes by posting the new terms on this page.

contact.title: 8. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through our support channels.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and handle your personal information when you use our services. By using our services, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

informationCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationCollection.content: We collect several types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our services:

items.personal: Personal identification information (name, email address, etc.)
items.usage: Usage data and analytics about how you interact with our services

useOfInformation.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
useOfInformation.content: We use the collected information for various purposes:

items.provision: To provide and maintain our services
items.improvement: To improve and personalize your experience
items.communication: To communicate with you about updates and support
items.security: To ensure security and prevent fraud

dataSharing.title: 3. Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.content: We may share your information in the following situations:

items.serviceProviders: With trusted service providers who assist in operating our services
items.legal: When required by law or to protect our rights

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

userRights.title: 5. Your Rights
userRights.content: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

items.access: Right to access your personal data
items.deletion: Right to request deletion of your data

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our services and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

childrenPrivacy.title: 7. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Our services are not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us through our support channels.

dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your account.
dashboard.profileSettingsDesc: Update your personal information and avatar

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: You can find all settings here.

auth.signOutOtherTab: You were signed out from another tab

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Ready to go? Just sign in below.

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Join {appName} and start building your dream team today!
signup.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue

passwordStrength.label: Password Strength:
passwordStrength.specialRequirement: At least one special character (!@#$% etc.)
passwordStrength.excellent: Excellent! Your password meets all security requirements.
passwordStrength.almostThere: Almost there! Just one more requirement to meet.
passwordStrength.veryWeakAdvice: Your password is very weak. Please follow the requirements above.

login.title: Welcome Back!
login.description: Ready to manage your workspace? Sign in to access your dashboard.
login.cardDescription: Secure entry to your complete management toolkit and settings.

signup.title: Join The Platform
signup.description: Begin your journey with Heisen Core today.
signup.cardDescription: Start with full access to premium features and security tools.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
forgotPassword.description: Every user faces obstacles. We'll get you back in.
forgotPassword.cardDescription: If our email doesn't appear in your main inbox within a couple of minutes, please check your spam or promotions folder - we want you back in the action as quickly as possible.

resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.description: Create a strong new password to keep your account secure. A strong password protects your data, settings, and access from unauthorized use.
resetPassword.cardDescription: Choose a robust password to protect your account and data.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.description: The final step before you access the platform.
verifyEmail.cardDescription: Complete verification to gain full access to your account.

alerts.emailVerified: Your email has been verified. You can now log in.
alerts.passwordReset: Your password has been successfully reset. Please log in.
alerts.emailChanged: Email updated successfully. Please log in with your new address.
alerts.emailTokenInvalid: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one from your account settings.
alerts.emailTaken: Your new email was already taken by another account by the time you confirmed. Please try a different address.

form.title: Reset Your Password
form.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

forgotPassword.helpText: We'll send a secure reset link to your email. The link will expire in 1 hour for security.

success.title: Check Your Email!
success.message: We've sent a password reset link to {email}. Click the link in the email to create a new password.
tips: Check your spam or junk folder
Make sure you entered the correct email address
Wait a few minutes and try again

form.title: Reset Your Password
form.subtitle: Choose a new password to secure your account.

resetPassword.helpText: Make sure your new password is different from previous passwords.

success.title: Password Updated!
success.message: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

links.backToLogin: Remember your password? Sign in here

requirements.title: Password Requirements:
items: Not used previously with this account

securityTips.title: Security Tips:
items: Use a unique password for each service
Never share your password with anyone

header.title: Verify Your Email
header.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to your email address.

help.title: Need help?
items: Check your spam or junk folder
Make sure you entered the correct email address
The code will expire in 5 minutes
Contact support if you continue having issues

success.title: Email Verified!
success.message: Your email has been successfully verified. Your account is now active and ready to use.

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.maxLength: Password must be at most 128 characters
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password.number: Password must contain at least one number
password.special: Password must contain at least one special character

name.lettersOnly: Name can only contain letters and spaces

terms.required: You must accept the terms and conditions

newEmail.invalid: Please enter a valid email address
newEmail.maxLength: Email must be at most 254 characters

newPassword.different: New password must be different from your current password

notFound.title: Whoops!
notFound.subtitle: Something went wrong
notFound.description: The page you're looking for isn't found, we suggest you back to home.

errors.authError: We encountered an issue during authentication. Please try again.
errors.appError: We encountered an issue loading the page. Please try again.

changeEmail.title: Change Email
changeEmail.description: Update the email address associated with your account.
changeEmail.emailSentTo: We sent a verification link to {email}. Check your inbox to confirm the change.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.heading: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with 2FA via email.
twoFactor.disabledDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account with two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.enabledStatus: Enabled — You will receive a verification code via email when logging in
twoFactor.disabledStatus: Disabled — You can log in by having an OTP code sent to your email before logging in
twoFactor.enableDialogDescription: Enter your current password to enable 2FA. You will receive a verification code via email each time you log in.
twoFactor.disableDialogDescription: Enter your current password to disable 2FA. This reduces your account security.

activeSessions.title: Active Sessions
activeSessions.description: Manage your active sessions and sign out from other devices.
activeSessions.confirmDescription: This will sign you out from all devices including this one. You will need to log in again on every device.

toasts.verifyEmailBeforeLogin: Please verify your email before logging in.
toasts.newVerificationCodeSent: A new verification code has been sent to your email
toasts.accountCreatedCheckEmail: Check your email to verify your account.
toasts.accountCreatedEmailFailed: Account created, but we couldn't send the verification email. Please use Resend Code.
toasts.resetLinkInvalid: Password reset link is invalid or missing. Please request a new reset email.
toasts.noEmailFound: No email address found. Please go back and try again.
toasts.verificationCodeSentTo: A new 6-digit code has been sent to {email}.
toasts.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
toasts.failedToResendVerification: Failed to resend verification code. Please try again.
toasts.emailMustBeDifferent: New email must be different from your current email
toasts.allDevicesSignedOut: All devices have been signed out
toasts.signOutAllFailed: Failed to sign out all devices

apiErrors.ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED: Account is deactivated. Please contact support.

apiErrors.SAME_EMAIL: New email is the same as your current email.
apiErrors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already in use.
apiErrors.EMAIL_CHANGE_PENDING: A verification email was already sent. Please check your inbox.
apiErrors.VERIFICATION_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Verification token has expired. Please request a new one.
apiErrors.INVALID_RESET_TOKEN: Invalid, expired, or already used reset token.

apiErrors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.

apiErrors.PASSWORD_RESET_RATE_LIMITED: Too many password reset attempts. Please try again later.

apiErrors.DATABASE_ERROR: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
apiErrors.RESET_FAILED: Password reset failed. Please try again.
apiErrors.TWO_FACTOR_SESSION_EXPIRED: Verification session expired. Please log in again.

apiErrors.EMAIL_DISPATCH_FAILED: Failed to send email. Please try again later.
apiErrors.TOKEN_REVOKED: Session invalid. Please log in again.
apiErrors.NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to connect. Check your internet connection.

interceptor.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

interceptor.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
interceptor.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

interceptor.rateLimitedSeconds: Too many requests. Please wait {seconds} seconds.
interceptor.serverError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
interceptor.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.

validationExtended.emailInvalid: Please provide a valid email address.

validationExtended.disposableEmail: Disposable email addresses are not allowed.
validationExtended.passwordLength: Password must be between 8 and 128 characters.
validationExtended.passwordLowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter.
validationExtended.passwordUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validationExtended.passwordNumber: Must contain at least one number.
validationExtended.passwordSpecial: Must contain at least one special character.

validationExtended.passwordSequential: Password contains sequential characters that are easy to guess.
validationExtended.passwordRepeated: Password contains too many repeated characters.
validationExtended.firstNameLength: First name must be between 3 and 16 characters long.

validationExtended.lastNameLength: Last name must be between 3 and 16 characters long.
validationExtended.lastNameLetters: Last name can only contain letters and spaces.
